meta.message: Urgent placement needed: RGN for nights at a 40-bed residential care home in Brighton BN1. 3-on-3-off pattern. PAYE £22/hr or umbrella £26/hr. Active NMC pin + 2yr post-reg experience required. No sponsorship. Start ASAP. Please source and screen suitable candidates.

essential_requirements: Active, unrestricted NMC pin — must be verified prior to submission
Right to work in the UK — no sponsorship available
desirable_criteria: Local to Brighton / BN postcode area — client preference
Full UK driving licence and own vehicle

red_flags: Left previous role under disciplinary investigation or action — do not submit
compliance_checks_required: Two satisfactory professional references (most recent employer must be included)
DBS check (enhanced, on update service preferred)

submission_instructions.notes: Client prefers local candidates — flag distance from BN1 on any submission outside Brighton & Hove. Do not submit anyone with a disciplinary exit on record. Confirm NMC pin before first contact. Send candidate profiles back via Sourcing_to_Architect.json marked as unread.
